page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.m1 server family. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, this instance features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, operating with 1.0 thread per core. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning storage must be attached externally. It also does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, offering predictable processing capabilities for workloads that require stable CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead.
This hardware profile is suited for general-purpose workloads, such as web serving, application servers, and moderate database hosting, where a balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio is required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance within the ecs.m1 family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 CPU architecture. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external storage attachments. With its balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio and dedicated CPU resources, the ecs.m1.xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads, including application servers, web serving, and moderate database tasks requiring consistent processing performance.
